title: PAR-RAG: Plan-then-Act-and-Review Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Reliable Multi-hop Reasoning

defines.name: PAR-RAG
defines.definition: A Plan-then-Act-and-Review retrieval-augmented generation framework that improves multi-hop reasoning reliability through complexity-aware planning, structured execution, and dual verification.

problem: Existing RAG methods for multi-hop QA suffer from reasoning path deviation and intermediate factual errors, and they lack a principled way to adapt planning and verification to semantic complexity.
